session.user: Run `make fast-ci` from the repository root /home/runner/work/erk/erk and report all results. Do NOT try to fix anything.

session.assistant:
## make fast-ci Results
**Status: FAILED (Exit Code 2)**
The `make fast-ci` command failed due to Prettier formatting issues. Here's the breakdown:
### Failure Summary
**Prettier Check** - Code style issues found in 2 files: - `docs/learned/integrations/github-review-decision.md` - `docs/learned/tui/status-indicators.md`
These files need formatting fixes. Run Prettier with --write to resolve.
### Passed Checks
- **Lint (ruff)**: All checks passed - **Format Check**: 1640 files already formatted - **Markdown Check**: OK - **Exec Reference Check**: OK (.claude/skills/erk-exec/reference.md is up to date) - **Type Check (ty)**: All checks passed - **CLAUDE.md/AGENTS.md Pairing**: All properly paired (19 files checked, 0 violations)
### Test Results (All Passed)
- **erk**: 5658 passed in 12.66s - **erk-dev**: 136 passed in 4.36s - **erk-statusline**: 115 passed in 0.83s - **erk-mcp**: 24 passed (count inferred from test count line)
### Issue
The build fails at the Prettier check step because 2 markdown files have formatting issues that don't comply with project formatting standards.
